description: In this episode, Helen Hai hosts Alex Dong and Tom Tapscott to discuss how blockchain technology can aid in combating the COVID-19 pandemic. They explore the importance of data management in healthcare, the role of blockchain in supply chains, and the potential for self-sovereign identities to enhance privacy while providing valuable data for public health.
topic_summary: The podcast covers the application of blockchain in fighting pandemics, focusing on data management, supply chain improvements, and privacy concerns related to health information. Key insights include the need for a unified data approach and the potential for blockchain to modernize outdated systems [t=60:09].
